action.description:
Introduced by Senators Spreitzer, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Pfaff, Ratcliff and Roys; 
cosponsored by Representatives Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Anderson, Brown, Clancy, DeSmidt, Emerson, Joers, Johnson, Kaufert, Kirsch, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Ortiz-Velez, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stubbs, Tenorio, Udell and Hysell
